name: Shadow Milk Cookie || MYOS
description:
Requested by @LuxIsntFound - Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"Once the Fount of Knowledge and now the Master of Deceit; Scorned by those who enjoyed the sweetest lies over the bitter truth, he begun to master the art of lying. Shadow Milk is now a theatric, silver-tongued trickster. But what turned him from a beacon of Knowledge into a monster like this..?"
[WARNING: He is MEAN. Also, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

YAAAY EPISODE 8 IS OUT SO I CAN EDIT THE DESCRIPTION!! He's pretty much fine and perfect, I just added BSapph to his relationships and fixed up his quotes' layout a bit.
Also my internet went out when I was making him so that's still REALLY funny to me?? He pranked me... Shadow Milk why....

ALSO, I will mention here- like on this PV bot- that I can't stop you from doing a PV x Shadow Milk interaction and do not judge you if you ship it. However, my ver. of Shadow Milk is specifically programmed against it, and I humbly ask you NOT to mention the ship in my reviews.
The reason for my discomfort, as mentioned there, HAS changed! Fortunately the implications in ep. 7 were actually false and Shadow Milk DID NOT watch PV grow up. HOWEVER, there are still several issues with the ship in my eyes and several of my friends are still deeply uncomfortable with SMxPV; Memory alteration is a huge discomfort I have with the ship among other things, for context.
Again, like last time, there is absolutely NO hate intended towards those who ship it. You can still use my bots for that purpose, as I can't dictate what you do and even if I could it wouldn't be right.
Your chat is your chat; But I hope you can understand and not mention the ship AT ALL in reviews, for my comfort and the sake of others who may feel the same way.
Thank you for understanding, and I hope you have fun nonetheless <3

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and I can't- nor can any other creators- prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, messing with settings, and editing messages that the bot sends.

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.


NSFW INFO
This bot has NSFW info; Select the text on your browser to read!
creator: Plaged0c
